description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on a schedule and on push to release and develop branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a job on Windows 2019 and Windows 2022 environments with various configurations of C++ versions, build types, architectures, and toolsets. For each configuration, check out the code, set up the build environment, configure CMake, build the project, run tests, and upload any crashes as an artifact.
